title: DeepSeek Grants Huawei Exclusive Early Access to V4 — Memory Chip War Intensifies
detail: Reports confirmed that DeepSeek withheld its next-generation V4 model from Nvidia and AMD for optimization, granting early deployment access exclusively to Huawei and Cambricon for inference hardware. In parallel, Huawei launched its UCM (Unified Cache Manager) system designed to reduce reliance on costly High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) chips — a critical bottleneck since China is denied access to HBM from South Korean suppliers Samsung and SK Hynix under US export controls. DeepSeek's architectural innovations, including reduced memory footprint requirements, align closely with Huawei's hardware roadmap. Analysts view the partnership as a strategic pivot: China is rebuilding its AI compute ecosystem to be self-sufficient by co-designing model architecture with available domestic hardware, rather than optimizing for unobtainable Nvidia chips. Each Huawei Ascend 910C delivers roughly 60% of an Nvidia H100's inference performance — but the DeepSeek-Huawei co-optimization is expected to narrow that gap for specific inference workloads.

media.caption: DeepSeek grants Huawei exclusive early access to V4 model, locks out Nvidia and AMD

title: Tianjin Port Achieves 88% Automation Using DeepSeek + Huawei PortGPT
detail: Tianjin Port's Second Container Terminal announced it had achieved 88% automation of core processes — up from 66% in 2024 — by deploying Huawei's Pangu model-based 'PortGPT' system integrated with DeepSeek's large language model. Operations and maintenance efficiency improved by 45%, while crane utilization rose an additional 12.3%. The milestone is showcased as a flagship example of China's 'AI+ action plan' from the 15th Five-Year Plan, where large industrial infrastructure integrates AI at the operational level. It demonstrates practical deployment of domestic AI tools in critical logistics infrastructure, which both the Chinese government and Chinese companies cite as evidence of competitive parity with Western AI applications.
